case_title: ULADZIMIR TABOLA VS. ADRIATIC INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-20-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-20-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT ADRIATIC INSURANCE COMPANY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TABOLA, ULADZIMIR IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ADRIATIC INSURANCE COMPANY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,950.82 FILED BY TABOLA, ULADZIMIR AS TO DEFENDANT ADRIATIC INSURANCE COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-20-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-20-2011 - JUDGMENT.
